mapper.sql: id, student_no, name, gender, birth_date, class_id, class_name, major_id, major_name, grade, phone, email, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, c.class_name, m.major_name, c.grade FROM student s LEFT JOIN class_info c ON s.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN major m ON s.major_id = m.id ORDER BY s.created_at DESC
SELECT s.*, c.class_name, m.major_name, c.grade FROM student s LEFT JOIN class_info c ON s.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN major m ON s.major_id = m.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
SELECT s.*, c.class_name, m.major_name, c.grade FROM student s LEFT JOIN class_info c ON s.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN major m ON s.major_id = m.id WHERE s.student_no = #{studentNo}

SELECT s.*, c.class_name, m.major_name, c.grade FROM student s LEFT JOIN class_info c ON s.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN major m ON s.major_id = m.id WHERE s.class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY s.created_at DESC

SELECT s.*, c.class_name, m.major_name, c.grade FROM student s LEFT JOIN class_info c ON s.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN major m ON s.major_id = m.id WHERE s.major_id = #{majorId} ORDER BY s.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student (student_no, name, gender, birth_date, class_id, class_name, major_id, major_name, grade, phone, email, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{studentNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{classId}, #{className}, #{majorId}, #{majorName}, #{grade}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE student SET student_no = #{studentNo}, name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, class_id = #{classId}, class_name = #{className}, major_id = #{majorId}, major_name = #{majorName}, grade = #{grade}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student WHERE student_no = #{studentNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student WHERE class_id = #{classId}
